meaning: adv.可论证地,正如可提出证据加以证明的那样
examples: Venus was arguably a cozier habitat for life than earth.
China has arguably the fastest-growing operations in Antarctica.
With Mars the scientific stakes are arguably higher than they have ever been.
The enterprise value is arguably less than what the Time Warner segment is worth on its own.
But currencies tend to be zero-sum games over time, and gold, arguably, is a lousy store of wealth.
